leadText: Stick redirects here. For the thrown item in the Pokémon Mystery Dungeon series, see Throwing item → Stick. The Leek (Japanese: ながねぎ Scallion), known as the Stick prior to Pokémon Sword and Shield, is a type of held item introduced in Generation II. It boosts the critical hit ratio of a Farfetch'd or Sirfetch'd that holds it.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] If held by a Farfetch'd or Sirfetch'd , it increases its critical-hit ratio by two stages.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description G S C An ordinary stick. Sell low. R S Colo A stick of leek. It can be sold cheaply. E XD A hold item that raises Farfetch'd 's critical-hit ratio. FR LG A stick of leek to be held by a Farfetch'd . It raises Farfetch'd 's critical-hit ratio. D P Pt HG SS An item to be held by Farfetch'd . It is a very long and stiff stalk of leek that boosts the critical-hit ratio. B W B2 W2 An item to be held by Farfetch'd. It is a very long and stiff stalk of leek that boosts the critical-hit ratio. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA An item to be held by Farfetch'd. This very long and stiff stalk of leek boosts its critical-hit ratio. S V An item to be held by Farfetch'd. This very long and stiff stalk of leek boosts the critical-hit ratio of Farfetch'd's moves. ZA An item to be held by Farfetch'd or Sirfetch'd. This very long and stiff stalk of leek boosts the critical-hit ratio of their moves.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] From Generation VI onward, Farfetch'd , Galarian Farfetch'd, and Sirfetch'd will always get a critical hit when using moves with a boosted critical hit ratio while holding the Leek.
